rulings.Case Title: DAVID EMERY VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 27, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT C.B.S. CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID EMERY VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 27, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA VENTURES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF'S DISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS ONE THROUGH THIRTEEN. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IS NOT BARRED BY D'AMICO. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO NUMBER ONE IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO TWO, THREE, FOUR AND FIVE ARE OVERRULED; NUMBER SIX IS ADMITTED ONLY TO SHOW WHAT THE EXPERT RELIED UPON, NOT FOR ITS TRUTH. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: NIKOLAUS VON BAILLOU VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 27, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PLEAD FACTS DEMONSTRATING AN INABILITY TO DISCOVER HIS CLAIM PRIOR TO THE RUNNING OF THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. ON ITS FACE, THE DEED GIVES NOTICE THAT THE PROPERTY WAS DEEDED TO BOTH PLAINTIFF AND HIS FORMER WIFE. THE CLAIM ALSO IS BARRED BY COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL GIVEN THE FINDINGS OF THE FLORIDA COURT. =(302/PJM/VC)
